# Shreyansh Mathur — Portfolio

> Strategy Associate at PwC India. Builder-consultant at the intersection of management consulting and software engineering. CS background. React / Python / AI stack.

## Identity

- Name: Shreyansh Mathur
- Current role: Associate, Strategy — PwC India (Aug 2025 – Present)
- Location: India
- Email: shreyanshmathur12@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/shreyanshmathur
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur
- Portfolio: https://shreyanshportfolioconsultant.netlify.app

## What I do

I sit at the crossroads of consulting and engineering. By day I run enterprise strategy engagements (GCC design, AI transformation programmes, IT operating model redesign). Outside of that I build the tools the engagements wish existed — forecasting bots, AI concierges, risk dashboards, pricing engines.

The through-line: strategy that ships.

## Experience

### PwC India — Associate, Strategy (Aug 2025 – Present)
- Five-year India Tech Hub strategy for a global FMCG client: scaled 27 → 108 FTEs across 4 geographies; C-suite alignment across India, Singapore, and Dubai.
- National AI Accelerator co-lead: 12 enterprise AI tools shipped; +15% tool adoption in 90 days; zero governance incidents.
- IT operating model redesign for a national cement leader across 15+ states: 25% faster incident dispatch; unified reporting.
- Tools: Power BI, Python, SAP FICO/MM, Excel VBA, Miro, Jira

### PwC India — Advisory Intern (Jan – Aug 2025)
- SAP FICO/MM optimisation for a major paint manufacturer: 500+ users trained; adoption target hit in 30 days post-go-live.
- Built a real-time programme tracker (Power BI) for 15+ concurrent initiatives; zero delivery slippage.
- Lean Six Sigma process mapping + VBA/Python automation: 20% cycle time reduction.
- Tools: SAP FICO/MM, Power BI, Python, Excel VBA

### EY — GCC Research Intern (Aug – Dec 2023)
- Deployed an AI sales pipeline across 4 city offices (Bengaluru, Mumbai, Hyderabad, Delhi): 75% reduction in manual prospecting.
- Built Tableau and Power BI dashboards for acquisition KPIs used by BD leadership.
- GCC benchmarking research cited in Fortune 500 strategy decks.
- Tools: Tableau, Power BI, Python, Excel

### BelleVidCo / MSC Consultancy — Co-founder and CEO (Feb 2023 – Dec 2024)
- 12 client engagements across 8 sectors: 3PL logistics, private equity, healthcare, retail AI, events, fashion, fintech, construction.
- 5× ROI on automation builds. 15+ clients served. 5-person specialist team.
- Key engagements: Robinsons Global Logistics (AI warehouse ops, ~35% pick travel cut), Bombay Closet Cleanse (AI pricing engine, 3,500 units/month), SPACES by Welspun (5 AI features, full shopping journey), Surya Hospitals (AI coordination layer, human-first governance), Milestone Search Capital (PE deal infrastructure, 50+ intermediaries).
- Tools: Python, scikit-learn, React, FastAPI, Groq, WhatsApp API, Shopify API, PostgreSQL

### Social Eyes — Business Development Intern (Jun – Aug 2023)
- 20% lift in lead conversion rate through targeted sales strategy implementation.
- 10% market penetration increase via customer behaviour analysis in hospitality and fashion verticals.

### Webminix — Business Development Intern (Mar – Apr 2022)
- 20% monthly revenue increase through new sales opportunities.
- 15% client acquisition boost via gym partnership channel.
- Managed and cleaned a 5,000+ contact marketing database.

### Recover Media — Marketing Team Lead (Aug 2020 – Jan 2023)
- Grew subscriber base by 8,000+ in six months; promoted to team lead within 6 months of joining.
- Multi-platform campaign frameworks lifted brand awareness 20%.
- Tools: Meta Ads, Google Analytics, Mailchimp

## Extracurricular Leadership (Campus)

### graVITas, VIT Vellore — Sponsorship Manager (Aug – Sep 2024)
- Secured ₹75L+ in sponsorship for the annual tech fest.
- Partners: Altium, Autodesk, Nestlé, EaseMyTrip.

### Riviera, VIT University — Sponsorship Coordinator (Jan – Mar 2024)
- Closed ₹1.25Cr+ in sponsorship for South India's largest cultural festival.
- Lead sponsors: Pepsi, Safe Express. Coordinated across 250+ events.

### Dream Merchants, VIT — Financial Mentor (Mar 2022 – Aug 2024)
- Mentored student entrepreneurs on financial planning; raised sponsorship for financial literacy programmes.

## Projects

### 01. Enterprise Capability Generator
- Type: Consulting Tool
- Client: Internal PwC engagements
- Stack: React 18, SheetJS, PptxGenJS, Recharts
- Impact: 4-6 hours of manual work eliminated per engagement
- Summary: Browser tool that ingests capability scoring across 8 business domains (XLSX) and exports fully formatted, branded PowerPoint decks in one click.

### 02. AI Pharmacy Demand Forecasting Bot
- Type: Healthcare AI
- Client: Pharmacy chain
- Stack: Python, pandas, Prophet, statsmodels, FastAPI, React
- Impact: 60-day forecast horizon, ~85% accuracy on test set
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/surya-pharmacy-os

### 03. Surya Hospital AI Coordination Layer
- Type: Healthcare Automation
- Client: Surya Hospital
- Stack: React, FastAPI, Groq (Llama), python-telegram-bot, PostgreSQL, WhatsApp Business API
- Impact: 60-second doctor pre-brief with full patient history; 6 AI capabilities; zero auto-sent communications
- Summary: Call intelligence, drop-off detection, patient records intelligence, WhatsApp community. AI proposes, human reviews, human sends. Human-first governance architecture.
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/SuryaPOC2

### 04. SPACES AI Shopping Experience
- Type: Retail AI
- Client: SPACES by Welspun (premium home textiles D2C)
- Stack: JavaScript, FastAPI, Groq (Llama 3), React, Cloudinary
- Impact: 5 AI features deployed across full customer journey, discovery to post-purchase
- Summary: Intent-aware discovery, AI colour harmony, style personalisation, room visualiser, post-purchase brand moments.
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/spaces-style-concierge

### 05. Learner Risk Copilot
- Type: EdTech AI
- Client: EdTech platform
- Stack: React, Groq AI, Netlify, Chart.js, Tailwind CSS
- Impact: Live in production; 78% precision on historical refund data in backtesting
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/learner-risk-copilot
- Live: https://learner-risk-copilot.netlify.app

### 06. Bombay Closet Cleanse AI Pricing Engine
- Type: Retail AI
- Client: Bombay Closet Cleanse (pre-loved fashion)
- Stack: Groq Vision (LLaVA), FastAPI, HTML/CSS/JS, Netlify, Shopify API, WhatsApp Business API
- Impact: ~5 seconds per item (from 4 minutes); 3,500+ units/month; zero manual pricing
- Summary: Photo-to-price engine: AI analyses brand, condition, and rarity, scrapes live market comps from Depop/Vinted, syncs to Shopify. Self-improving override loop. WhatsApp seller intake bot.
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/bcc-pricing-poc

### 07. Baring Private Equity India Site
- Type: Corporate Website
- Client: Baring Private Equity Partners India
- Stack: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Netlify
- Impact: Live in production; sub-1s load time
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/baring-private-equity

### 08. Robinsons Global Logistics AI Ops
- Type: Ops Automation
- Client: Robinsons Global Logistics (3PL warehousing, Bhiwandi)
- Stack: Python, scikit-learn, FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL
- Impact: ~35% pick travel reduced; 60%+ data visibility gained; deployed in 4 weeks
- Summary: AI SKU placement engine using velocity data, smart CRM layer, real-time safety monitoring. Full on-site discovery before build. Three workstreams, one integrated outcome.

### 09. Milestone Search Capital
- Type: Corporate Website
- Client: Milestone Search Capital (India-focused search fund)
- Stack: React, Notion CRM, Webflow, Airtable, Zapier
- Impact: 50+ intermediaries activated; 50%+ research time saved; 8-week full build
- Summary: Institutional website, deal pipeline CRM, curated intermediary network, target research framework. Built to pass the Google test before the first conversation.

### 10. Jakota Brand and AI Command Board
- Type: Corporate Website
- Client: Jakota (engineered formwork and scaffolds)
- Stack: React, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Recharts, Webflow
- Impact: 1 unified command board; zero data silos; full digital presence rebuilt
- Summary: Full website rebuild aligning presence to engineering authority. AI command board consolidating all operational data streams: project status, resources, equipment, financials.

## Skills and tools

- Strategy and consulting: GCC design, operating model, AI transformation, process improvement (Lean Six Sigma), programme management
- Engineering: React 18, Python, FastAPI, Node.js, HTML/CSS/JS
- AI/ML: Groq (Llama, LLaVA), Prophet, scikit-learn, ARIMA, LLM integrations
- Data: Power BI, Tableau, pandas, PostgreSQL, Excel VBA
- Enterprise systems: SAP FICO/MM
- Deployment: Netlify, Vite, GitHub Actions

## Site structure

- / — Home (hero, ticker strip with key metrics, highlights)
- /#/experience — Full experience list with side-panel detail for each role
- /#/projects — 10 case studies with filter chips (Consulting Tool, Ops Automation, Healthcare AI, Healthcare Automation, Retail AI, EdTech AI, Corporate Website)
- /#/projects/:slug — Case study detail (challenge, approach, outcomes, toolkit)
- /#/about — Background, education, skills
- /#/contact — Direct contact
